title: Editable Actionbar
description: A mod that allows to reposition and rescale the actionbar
body:
**This mod allows players to be able to edit their action bar with a key bind.**

_Player's will now be able to move and resize their action bar with positions being saved for ease of access._

![New GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0647f92f6577f85248751848b3cf3b8a858b9a35_0.webp)

[Source Code](https://github.com/TheSpoofies/Editable-ActionBar)


**DM me at thespoofies. on discord for any ideas or bugs!**
**Or join the discord to get involved or quicker replies!**
